prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-HANGINGLANTERN-PARENT Product Type: ELECTRIC_LANTERN Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor LED Battery Operated Hanging Mini Lantern Camping Dimmable Description: Hands free, portable, lightweight, long-lasting, durable and hangable, this little compact camping lantern might be small, but it packs a lot of light and functionality. The ASR Outdoor LED Battery Operated Hanging Mini Compact Camping Lantern is great for when you're on the go and is also great when stationary too, able to sit on any flat surface whether you're cooking, reading or playing cards at the camping table. The camping lantern can be used both indoors and outside.

Featuring COB/LED 180 Lumen brightness that's completely dimmable, you can easily control the level of lighting by turning the front dimmer switch dial to whichever brightness setting best suits the activity or task at hand. And, not only is it a great item to have when camping or backpacking, it's also a handy compact lantern to have in your workshop or garage for extra added light; the mini lantern for camping is also a great addition to any survival kit, bug out bag or vehicle emergency preparedness bag too. The camping lantern can also be used indoors for when larger, overhead lighting is too bright or not needed.

The ASR Outdoor LED Battery Operated Hanging Mini Compact Camping Lantern provides completely hands free lighting, due to the handy, foldable hanging hook; the compact lantern for camping and wilderness adventures is easily hung from the inside of your tent, on a nearby branch, on the side of a backpack or on a wall hook; no extra attachments or materials are required. The lantern comes with three (3) included AA batteries that provide 360 degrees of luminous lighting.

A Outdoor camping essential, be sure to pack this mini, battery operated, dimmable camping lantern on your next camping trip, backpacking excursion or wilderness adventure. Easy to use, tote, pack and hang, the hanging compact lantern for camping and more will provide you with ample, controllable illumination wherever you take it.

Please Note: Color green or black Search Terms: camping accessories RV lights tent gear lantern campground lighting grill supplies essentials travel size lanterns camp cooking set flashlight gadgets for tent Features: - LED MINI CAMPING LANTERN: Lighting, portable and battery operated, this LED mini hanging camping lantern is perfect for your next camping trip; measuring just 8 inches tall, the camping lantern can sit on any flat surface or easily hang from inside your tent providing bright or low lighting depending on your activity; 180 Lumen COB/LED brightness - CONVENIENT DIMMABLE LIGHT: Compact lantern features a great range of lighting that easily adjust via the dimmer switch on the front of the dimmable camping light; the lantern could also be used in a workshop or garage for extra lighting if needed - HANDS FREE LIGHTING: A sturdy plastic foldable hanging hook, allowing you to hang from just about anywhere, including the outside of a backpack or in your tent; due the mini lanterns light weight, coming in under 1 pound, the compact lantern can hang from just about anywhere with no extra support or hanging materials required - INDOOR AND OUTDOOR USE: This battery powered camping lamp is extraordinarily versatile; Use it while camping, fishing, hunting, trekking, climbing, during power outages, for auto maintenance, highway emergencies and more; the compact mini camping lantern is also a great item to add to your vehicle emergency preparedness bag, survival kit or bug out bag - SPECIFICATIONS: Color: Black or Silver; Dimensions: 8 inches tall x 3.5 inches wide; Weight: 0.44lbs; Brightness: 180 Lumen; Three (3) AA batteries are included for operation === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
